subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the first [to believe]
subcodes.first_line: Verily all glory from God be upon His Most Luminous Light and upon them that resemble that Light among His most manifest guides [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انما البهاء من الله علی نوره الأنور و من یشابه ذلک النور من أدلائه الأظهر الأظهر
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @visitation Tablets, @rejection, opposition and persecution
